sentences.arabic: الذَّكَاءُ الِاصْطِنَاعِيُّ تِقْنِيَّةٌ حَدِيثَةٌ تُغَيِّرُ الْعَالَمَ.
sentences.translation: Vještačka inteligencija je moderna tehnologija koja mijenja svijet.
sentences.translationEn: Artificial intelligence is a modern technology that is changing the world.

sentences.arabic: يُمْكِنُ لِلْحَوَاسِيبِ أَنْ تَتَعَلَّمَ وَتَحُلَّ الْمُشْكِلَاتِ الْمُعَقَّدَةَ.
sentences.translation: Računari mogu učiti i rješavati složene probleme.
sentences.translationEn: Computers can learn and solve complex problems.

sentences.translation: Mnoge kompanije je koriste za poboljšanje svojih usluga.
sentences.translationEn: Many companies use it to improve their services.

sentences.arabic: هُوَ يُسَاعِدُ الْأَطِبَّاءَ فِي الْمُسْتَشْفَيَاتِ عَلَى تَشْخِيصِ الْأَمْرَاضِ.
sentences.translation: Ona pomaže ljekarima u bolnicama da dijagnostikuju bolesti.
sentences.translationEn: It helps doctors in hospitals to diagnose diseases.
